messages.content:
I need a comprehensive to-do list based on my conversation transcripts. Please analyze the transcript and identify all tasks, commitments, and follow-up actions I mentioned or agreed to.
Importantly: Only use items that I specifically said I would do. Do not include things other people said they would do.
For each item, include enough detail that I can understand what needs to be done without having to review the entire transcript again. Use action verbs at the beginning of each task.
Group related tasks together when possible, and highlight any dependencies between tasks (e.g., "Complete X before starting Y").
Exclude routine activities or general comments that don't require specific action.

Certainly, Rami. Here’s a comprehensive to-do list based strictly on your own stated commitments and actions from the transcripts provided. Only tasks you specifically said you would do are included, with enough context for clarity and grouped by theme.

---

## Recruitment & Staffing

- **Prepare candidate table:**  
  - Create a table of all psychiatrist candidates, including their current stage in the recruitment process.
  - If unclear about a candidate’s stage, share the table with Elias and others for input.
- **Initiate follow-up with candidates:**  
  - Follow up with psychiatrist candidates who have not responded to recent emails.
- **Coordinate interviews:**  
  - Request available interview times from relevant team members (e.g., “send me your available hours for interviews”) to set up joint interview slots.
- **Plan training for new hires:**  
  - Consult with Mooli regarding essential topics for new case manager training based on past experience.
  - Organize initial professional/theoretical training sessions (e.g., psychiatric interview, medications) before new case managers start work.

---

## Scheduling & System Adjustments

- **Adjust appointment durations:**  
  - For Dr. Said: Change all his future appointments from August 1 onward so that intakes are reduced to 20 minutes and follow-ups to 10 minutes (from previous longer durations).
- **Review and update calendar entries:**  
  - Go through Dr. Said’s scheduled appointments and manually adjust durations as needed in both the calendar and clinic system.
- **Communicate schedule changes:**  
  - Decide whether to notify affected patients by email/WhatsApp or phone regarding their updated appointment times after changes are made.

---

## Operational Improvements & Data Management

- **Define cancellation/no-show policy logic:**  
  - Work with Shahar (or relevant tech lead) to ensure that cancellations made within a certain window before an appointment (e.g., same-day or within four hours) are tracked distinctly for therapist compensation purposes.
- **Request data/reporting enhancements:**
  - Ask Shahar to provide monthly satisfaction reports similar to those previously received, ensuring this becomes a regular process.
- **Send summary template/sample:**  
  - Locate and resend the summary template (“prompt” and “template”) for first phone call summaries with therapists if requested by colleagues.

---

## Technical/System Coordination

- **Clarify real-time transcription workflow:**  
  - Confirm how real-time transcription is activated during online meetings (e.g., clarify if captioning needs manual activation).
- **Investigate language support in transcription tools:**  
  - Check whether Arabic-language transcriptions are being generated correctly in your current system setup; adjust settings if necessary.

---

## Project-Specific Follow-ups

### Maccabi Youth Program
- **Monitor missing paperwork progress:**
    - Continue reminding Oriel about submitting required documents (CV, medical license, Stage A completion proof).
    - If Oriel cannot obtain official documentation promptly, coordinate with Anath or Tali about possible alternatives or interim solutions.

### Internal Communication Tools
- **Review/implement internal task management feature:**
    - Explore options for adding an inter-team task assignment feature in your clinic’s system—allowing staff/admins to assign tasks directly to each other rather than relying on WhatsApp messages.

---

## Dependencies & Sequencing Notes

1. Adjust Dr. Said’s appointment durations before notifying patients of time changes.
2. Prepare candidate table before requesting input from others on unclear candidate statuses.
3. Review internal communication/task management needs before proposing any technical implementation.

---

If you need any item expanded further or want this prioritized by urgency/impact, let me know!
